name: snipetrench-bot
description: Telegram copy-trading bot for Solana. Watches Pump.fun dev wallets, executes Jupiter v6/Metis swaps when a watched wallet sells its own token, holds 1s, exits. TradeWiz-style settings menu, multi-user broadcast, setMyCommands autocomplete. Documentation-first, safety-first.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check src/*.js && node --check scripts/*.js
